global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a central content area and clear call-to-action buttons.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to start binge-watching with a promotional offer.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: The 'PulsePlay' logo appears at the top, featuring bold, modern typography in white against the blue background.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A central rectangular area with rounded corners, featuring a light blue outline and empty space for visual content.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with rounded edges, displaying the text 'Claim reward' in white on a darker blue background.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small circular element with the text 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Binge starts now text
elements.description: The text 'Binge starts now Cancel anytime' is displayed prominently in white, centered within the main content area.

elements.label: Circular icons
elements.description: Two small circular icons are positioned within the main content area, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A button at the bottom with rounded edges, featuring the text 'Claim reward' in white on a blue background.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified element that may serve a decorative or functional purpose, positioned at the top.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
